name: US Cash Advance
description_short: US Cash Advance connects borrowers in Detroit and online with third-party lenders for payday loans, cash advances, and bad credit loans up to $50,000.
description_long:
US Cash Advance operates a physical branch at 20002 Schoolcraft Rd, Detroit, MI 48223, with extended hours seven days a week. Their corporate contact address is listed as 236 W Tremont Ave #102, Charlotte, NC 28203, suggesting a multi-location or centralized operation behind the storefront. The Detroit location carries a 4.4 customer rating and staff are mentioned by name in reviews, indicating a functioning in-person service.

The company offers payday loans and cash advances capped at $1,000, same-day loans, bad credit loans ranging from $250 to $50,000, personal loans for bad credit, debt consolidation, and loans without a credit check. All products are marketed as unsecured and open to all credit types. Their process is explicitly a lead-generation or brokering model: customers fill out an online inquiry form and are then connected to a third-party lender rather than receiving a direct loan from US Cash Advance itself.

What distinguishes this provider is the combination of a physical Detroit storefront with extended hours (Monday–Friday 8am–9pm, Saturday–Sunday 10am–7pm) and an online application pathway. Customer reviews highlight fast turnaround — one borrower reports approval and funding within two hours — and praise for transparent explanations of repayment terms. The in-person option sets them apart from pure online lenders for borrowers who prefer face-to-face assistance.

Honestly, US Cash Advance is a loan broker, not a direct lender. Rates and APR are not disclosed on the page, which is a significant transparency gap. One review references 'Express Payday Loans' rather than US Cash Advance, raising questions about review authenticity. The contact email domain (env-uscashadvance-compliance.kinsta.cloud) is non-standard and suggests a managed-compliance or white-label site infrastructure. Borrowers should verify lender identity, APR, and fee terms before signing any agreement.
address: 108 E Parrish St unit A, Durham, NC 27701

company_info.headquarters: 108 E Parrish St unit A, Durham, NC 27701

pros: Physical Detroit branch with extended hours 7 days a week (Mon–Fri 8am–9pm, weekends 10am–7pm)
All credit types accepted — explicitly markets to bad credit borrowers
Same-day funding available — at least one reviewer received funds within 2 hours
No collateral required — all loans are unsecured
Wide loan range: $100 payday advances up to $50,000 bad credit loans
Staff (named 'Doris' in reviews) praised for patient, transparent explanations of repayment terms
Online inquiry form available for remote applications alongside in-person option
cons: Brokerage model — US Cash Advance connects you to third-party lenders, not a direct lender itself
APR and fee disclosures are absent from the website
Contact email uses a non-standard hosting domain (kinsta.cloud), not a professional business email
At least one review appears to reference a different lender ('Express Payday Loans'), raising authenticity concerns
Payday loan maximum of $1,000 is low for borrowers needing larger emergency amounts
best_for: Detroit-area borrowers who prefer in-person loan assistance over online-only processes
Consumers with poor or no credit history who have been turned away by traditional lenders
Borrowers needing a small emergency advance ($100–$1,000) with same-day funding
People who want staff to walk them through loan terms before signing
diagnosis: US Cash Advance suits Detroit-area borrowers with bad credit who need fast small-dollar cash and value in-person service with extended hours. The main caveat is that it operates as a loan broker connecting applicants to unnamed third-party lenders, with no APR transparency — borrowers must carefully review the actual lender's terms before accepting any offer.
